nasb.text: He will redeem my soul in peace from the battle which is against me, For they are many who strive with me.

esv.text: He redeems my soul in safety from the battle that I wage, for many are arrayed against me.

cnv.text: 他救贖我的性命脫離攻擊我的人， 使我得著平安， 儘管攻擊我的人的確很多。

ccb.text: 虽然许多人攻击我， 祂必救我平安脱离险境。

csbs.text: 他救赎我的性命脱离攻击我的人， 使我得享平安， 尽管敌对我的人众多。
